title: ODHS LANGUAGE ACCESS AND ACCOMMODATIONS - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS LANGUAGE ACCESS AND ACCOMMODATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides language interpretation, including sign language. Offers written materials in other languages and print materials in alternative formats such as braille, real-time captioning (CART), large print, audio, and other formats to access Oregon Department of Human Services (ODHS) programs or services. Cannot answer questions about specific ODHS programs or services. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: People who speak or use a language other than English, people with disabilities, or people who need written materials in alternative formats Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (833) 685-0841 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (833) 685-0841 ODHS Language Access And Accommodations Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email, and leave a message that includes name, phone number, and the type of accommodation needed. Accepts all relay calls. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Language Interpretation Sign Language Interpretation Telecommunication Relay Services Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - ODHS DISASTER CASE MANAGEMENT HOTLINE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH EXPERIENCING HOMELESSNESS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ODHS LOCAL OFFICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE ABUSE REPORTING HOTLINE LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - ODHS FRAUD INVESTIGATIONS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON ONE ELIGIBILITY PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - REFUGEE SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - CHILDREN'S EXTRAORDINARY NEEDS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES
